zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Fermour於1488年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆。她於1502年與Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards在英國諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1532年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 巴爾善姆享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fermour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Farmer
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English fermo(u)r, fermer and Anglo-Norman French fermer (Old French fermier, medieval Latin firmarius). The term denoted in the first instance a tax farmer, one who undertook the collection of taxes, revenues, and imposts, paying a fixed (Latin firmus) sum for the proceeds, and only secondarily someone who rented land for the purpose of cultivation; it was not applied to an owner of cultivated land before the 17th century.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Mac an Scolóige ‘son of the husbandman’, a rare surname of northern and western Ireland.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Terrien   ‘owner of a farmland’ or of its altered form   Therrien  . Compare   Pharmer  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Fermour was born in 1488, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards in 1502, in Rougham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1532, in East Barsham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fermour(은)는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 바샤에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Fermour родилась в 1488 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry  Morgard Femour Richards в 1502 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1532 г. в местности эаст баршам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
